name: Large Energy Companies (Germany)
description: Large energy utilities and producers in Germany with 5,000+ employees, including E.ON, RWE, and EnBW-scale enterprises.

tam.description: Total IT services spend by European energy sector
tam.source: LLM estimate based on Gartner IT spending benchmarks for energy/utilities sector in Europe (~3-4% of revenue on IT, ~EUR 300B sector revenue in EU)

sam.description: Cloud infrastructure services for large German energy companies
sam.source: LLM estimate: ~15 large energy companies in DE, avg EUR 120M cloud/IT infrastructure spend each, filtered to cloud-relevant services

som.description: 5 enterprise customers x EUR 9M avg ACV in 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up estimate: T-Systems can realistically win 5 of ~15 large energy accounts at EUR 7-11M ACV for managed cloud + sovereign cloud + SAP workloads
